lastSyncNeedsAttentionSubtitle: The last cloud sync needs attention
purchaseTokenHint: Paste the real Google Play purchase token
shellClearDataConfirmBody: This removes your personal inventory, sales, and cached account data from this device. Shared workspace data is not deleted.
shellClearDataConfirmTitle: Clear personal data from this device?
shellClearDataSubtitle: Use this if you want to wipe local personal data and start fresh on this device.
shellClearLiveSinglesConfirmBody: Remove every item from the live pricing list?
shellImportWhatnotCsvSubtitle: Load a CSV export when you want to review imports before saving.
shellNoLotBody: Create or select inventory to use live pricing and sales tracking.
shellOfflineNotice: You are offline. Changes stay local until your connection returns.
shellReviewWhatnotImportsSubtitle: Open the review queue before you create or update sales.
whatnotPersonalSubtitle: Connect your Whatnot account to import orders into Personal
whatnotSharedWorkspaceSubtitle: Connect your Whatnot account for this shared workspace
workspaceInviteSubtitle: Use your Google account to accept this workspace invite and keep your Personal workspace too.
workspaceInviteWithPersonalCopy: Your inventory, cloud sync, and Pro access are tied to your Google account.
workspaceRealtimeCatchingUpSubtitle: Refreshing the latest workspace state before applying live updates.
workspaceRealtimeIdleSubtitle: Realtime not active for this view
workspaceRealtimeRecoveredSubtitle: Latest workspace data is current again.
workspaceRealtimeStaleSubtitle: Refresh to recover the latest data.
workspaceRealtimeStaleTitle: Workspace data may be out of date
shellCreateWorkspaceBody: This starts a new shared workspace and copies your current Personal data into it.
shellLeaveWorkspaceMemberBody: You will lose access to this shared workspace and return to Personal mode.
shellLeaveWorkspaceOwnerBody: Owners need to transfer ownership before leaving, or confirm deletion if they are the last member.
shellLeaveWorkspaceDeleteConfirm: I understand this will delete the workspace for everyone.
shellJoinWorkspaceBody: This will add a new shared workspace alongside your Personal workspace.
shellMembersEmptyBody: Try refreshing the workspace or creating a new invite link.
shellTransferOwnerHint: Choose the member who should become owner when you leave.
